channel.title: SpeakForWater
channel.description: Making water resources research accessible to everyone. Join Anna and Ehsan as they discuss the latest open-access papers on hydrology, flood management, remote sensing, and water engineering — explained in plain language for farmers, water managers, and anyone who cares about water.
channel.itunes:author: Ehsan Kahrizi

item.title: Ep 5: Hydrological and Geochemical Modeling of Water Availability and Quality in the Jordan Valley Under Climate Change
item.description:
SpeakForWater Episode 5: Hydrological and Geochemical Modeling of Water Availability and Quality in the Jordan Valley Under Climate Change. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
Original paper: https://www.mdpi.com/2073-4441/18/6/721/pdf

item.title: Ep 4: Contrasting Climatic and Land-Use Controls Structure Nutrient and Turbidity Regimes Across Mediterranean River Basins
item.description:
SpeakForWater Episode 4: Contrasting Climatic and Land-Use Controls Structure Nutrient and Turbidity Regimes Across Mediterranean River Basins. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
Original paper: https://www.mdpi.com/2073-4441/18/6/728/pdf

item.title: Ep 1: Experimental evaluation of two-layer air bubble curtains to prevent seawater intrusion into rivers
item.description:
SpeakForWater Episode 1: Experimental evaluation of two-layer air bubble curtains to prevent seawater intrusion into rivers. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
Original paper: https://iwaponline.com/jwcc/article/14/2/543/92985/Experimental-evaluation-of-two-layer-air-bubble
